description: Style Note Taking a traditional design and giving it a modern twist is what makes esprit watches timeless timepieces. Contemporary and trendy, this is an affordable timepiece with an exquisite design that highlights your individuality. Product Details Case style: Stainless steel round case with crystal embellishments on the bezel Dial style: Silver dial with white and silver hands Strap style: Pink plastic strap with a tang clasp Features: Branding on the dial and screw to reset time Water resistant Size Case diameter: 33 mm Case thickness: 3 mm
